title: Clearing Operations Analyst (Bank|Up to $5k)
description:
The Opportunity

  • This is an exciting opportunity to work for one of the leading global banks
  • It is an opportunity for a Clearing Operations Analyst to join the team
  • Starts off as a contract role with fixed end date 31 Dec 2026

The Job

  • Responsible for reconciliation activities across APAC exchanges supported from Singapore, which include:
  • Oversight of reconciliation activities
  • Manage sub-ledger corrections
  • Act as escalation point for issues raised by the L1 reconciliation team
  • Client money break reporting
  • MIS reporting
  • Break management and escalation
  • Investigate breaks and issues raised
  • Continuous Improvement of the Operating Environment with regards to Straight-Through-Processing, Risk and Control
  • Ensure compliance of reconciliation operations to internal policies and relevant rules and regulations
  • Engage with Operation and Technology teams, including Global Business Services (GBS), to ensure smooth reconciliation operations

The Talent

  • Knowledge of financial markets with hands‑on experience in Clearing operations and post‑trade processes.
  • Proficiency in MS Product Suite i.e. Excel, Word etc. is essential
  • Ability to work in a high volume, dynamic environment Technology while maintaining operational excellence.
  • Bloomberg, Reuters and corporate action processing knowledge preferable

Next Steps

  • Drop your resume and contact us to follow-up, or send your resume to amos.tan@adecco.com
  • Email Topic: Apply Clearing Operations Analyst
  • Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted

Amos Tan Jun Han

EA Licence Number: 91C2918

Personnel Registration Number: R23113385

postedCompany.description:
The Adecco Group is the world's leading provider of HR solutions. With over 35,000 FTE employees and over 5,200 branches, in over 60 countries and territories around the world, we offer a wide variety of services, connecting more than 650,000 associates with over 100,000 clients every day.

The services we offer fall into the broad categories of temporary staffing, permanent placement, career transition and talent development, as well as outsourcing and consulting. The Adecco Group is based in Zurich-Glattbrugg, Switzerland and we are a Fortune Global 500 company listed on the SIX Swiss Exchange.
postedCompany.name: ADECCO PERSONNEL PTE LTD
